publicV1.reason: The fix changes internal BoxLite command synchronization plus provider-center provisioning ownership and cleanup fencing; it does not add or alter any Public V1 operation, schema, status code, or error body.

mcp.reason: No MCP tool, argument, result, registration, or transport behavior changes because MCP does not expose provider-native execution, internal sandbox ownership, or terminal cleanup fencing.

openapi.reason: No public HTTP contract changes, so there is no OpenAPI operation or schema projection to regenerate.

apiPlayground.reason: The API Playground has no BoxLite native execution surface and therefore requires no catalog or rendering change.

internalOnly.reason: Changes the internal BoxLite provider state machine and provider-center ownership protocol so output settlement is complete, physical creation is fenced before exposure, cleanup is provider-confirmed, and cancellation remains the truthful terminal winner.
